data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The Event Story 'Winter Sky's Renaissance: Thesis on Cultural Exchange' is starting!

The Publishing Department attempts to sell the Knowledge Liberation Front's "works" in Trinity, but things take a totally unexpected turn!

⬇️Promotional Video ⬇️
https://youtu.be/d-aWFrP29zw
